Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2026

Meridian Dispute Resolution Inc (“Meridian”) is committed to protecting the privacy of individuals who contact us or use our services. This policy describes what information we collect, how it is used, and how it is protected.

Information We Collect

When you submit a consultation request through this website, we collect the name, email address, and situational information you provide. We do not collect payment information through this site.

How We Use Your Information

Information submitted through the contact form is used solely to assess your situation and respond to your consultation request. We do not sell, trade, or share your information with third parties, except as required by law.

Confidentiality of Mediation Communications

Information disclosed during mediation sessions is subject to confidentiality obligations that are separate from and in addition to this privacy policy. Those obligations are explained in full at the outset of each engagement.

Third-Party Services

This site uses Formspree to process contact form submissions. Formspree may store submitted data in accordance with their own privacy policy. We encourage you to review Formspree's privacy terms at formspree.io.

Contact

Questions about this policy can be directed to Meridian via the contact page.

Meridian Dispute Resolution Inc

Mediation services across Canada. Based in Saskatchewan. Not legal counsel. Not therapy.
